**Which spec file?**
<!-- e.g. spec/grammar.md, spec/evaluation.md, profiles/gdpr/v1.md, crossmap/oscal.md -->

**Is this normative or editorial?**
<!-- normative = changes how a conforming implementation must behave (requires an RFC)
     editorial = typo, clarification, example, conformance vector -->

**Section / line**
<!-- point to the exact part -->

**Proposed change**
<!-- describe what should change and why; include a minimal example if relevant -->
